rating_basis: abstract-level review (titles/authors/abstracts); not full-text peer review

papers.title: Automated Discovery Has No Universally Superior Harness
papers.tier_reason: 30 个预算对齐 harness×12 模型-问题对、310 万 rollout 重复试验；无普适最优 harness，应作超参调。
papers.notes: 自动发现无普适最优 harness：harness 是超参数

papers.title: Is Progressive Disclosure All You Need for Long-Context Agents?
papers.tier_reason: 3 harness×3 模型族受控研究 Agent Skills 渐进披露；增益取决于 harness，一层足够。
papers.notes: 渐进披露买的是上下文而非智能；强 harness 下近零增益

papers.title: Do Agent Optimizers Compound? A Continual-Learning Evaluation on Terminal-Bench 2.0
papers.tier_reason: 三方法×两阶段 continual 对照；回归控制决定 harness 优化增益能否复利。
papers.notes: agent 优化器增益能否复利：回归控制是关键

papers.title: Self-Evolving Agent Harnesses via Gated Semantic Quality-Diversity
papers.tier_reason: 提案与计分分离；密封测试上 +9–15.5pp，病理键归档抗过拟合。
papers.notes: 门控语义质量多样性驱动的自演化 harness

papers.title: Better Harnesses, Smaller Models: Building 90% Cheaper Agents via Automated Harness Adaptation
papers.tier_reason: 故障轨迹驱动自动适配；多任务×多 SLM，成本–性能数字具体。
papers.notes: 小模型+适配 harness 路线

papers.title: From Prompts to Contracts: Harness Engineering for Auditable Enterprise LLM Agents
papers.tier_reason: 合约/模型替换/提示vs代码消融齐全的企业工程模式。
papers.notes: 原型到可审计系统

papers.title: TTHE: Test-Time Harness Evolution
papers.tier_reason: 测试时仅用未标注轨迹演化 harness；不改权重、不要金标。
papers.notes: 测试时适应范式

papers.title: The Harness Effect: How Orchestration Design Sets the Token Economics of Enterprise Agentic AI
papers.tier_reason: 锁任务锁模型只换编排层；多模型成本/时延/token 对照清晰。
papers.notes: 企业 harness 经济学首选实证

papers.title: Measuring Harness-Induced Belief Divergence in Multi-Step LLM Agents
papers.tier_reason: 把 harness 当作评测实验变量；信念诊断框架清晰。
papers.notes: 读其它 harness 结果前应参考

papers.title: Benchmarking the Benchmarks: A Validity Audit of Tool-Calling Evaluation
papers.tier_reason: 工具调用基准有效性审计；人评分歧与重复方差证据硬。
papers.notes: 含 Tool-Veritas / Harness Lab

papers.title: Harness-Bench: Measuring Harness Effects across Models in Realistic Agent Workflows
papers.tier_reason: 跨模型实测 harness 效应；与 Harness Effect 互补的评测基建。
papers.notes: Harness-Bench：模型–harness 配置是能力单位

papers.title: Auditing Agent Harness Safety
papers.tier_reason: 轨迹级 harness 安全审计：210 任务×8 域×10 配置；完成率与安全执行错位、违规随轨迹长度累积。
papers.notes: HarnessAudit：输出正确≠执行安全

papers.title: FlashRT: Agent Harness for Guiding Agents to Deploy Real-Time Multimodal Applications
papers.tier_reason: chain-of-program 引导编码代理产出多 GPU 部署；数字亮但域限实时多模态服务。
papers.notes: FlashRT：引导代理做实时多模态部署优化

papers.title: TRIM: Reducing AI-Generated CodeSlop via Agent Trajectory Minimization
papers.tier_reason: 定义 CodeSlop 并以轨迹最小化削减 17.9–32.9%；对代码库长期可维护性有工程价值。
papers.notes: TRIM：最小化轨迹以减少 AI 代码冗余

papers.title: Autoresearch with Coding Agents: Generalizers and Metric-Maximizers on Quran Recitation Data
papers.tier_reason: 生产任务上自然捕获 spec gaming（逐行背答案）；加 held-out 后消失。样本小但预注册。

papers.title: Adaptive Adversaries: A Multi-Turn, Multi-LLM Benchmark for LLM Agent Security

papers.notes: Adaptive Adversaries：适应性攻击者×无记忆防御者
